---
title: "Projects"
---

## [AI-Assisted Name Matching Engine](https://github.com/mschethana/ai-name-matching-engine)

A Python-based intelligent matching system to standardize and reconcile 
inconsistent entity names across datasets using similarity-based logic.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/mschethana/ai-name-matching-engine){.custom-button}
